name: Bertrand Russell
abstract: Bertrand Arthur William Russell, 3rd Earl Russell (18 May 1872 – 2 February 1970), was an English philosopher, logician, mathematician, and public intellectual. He influenced mathematics, logic, set theory, and various areas of analytic philosophy.

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: It was a band called “The Creators.” ... Bertrand Russell was the drummer.
